title: Nuage Day Cream 50 ml – Oil Enriched Daily Face Moisturiser with Argan, Olive & Apricot Oils for Normal to Dry Skin
features: Oil-Enriched Formula for Daily Care – Blended with argan, olive, and apricot kernel oils, this day cream helps maintain soft, supple skin. The smooth, creamy texture absorbs easily without leaving residue, providing comfort and hydration throughout the day

Nourishing Moisture for Normal to Dry Skin – Specially designed to support daily moisture balance, this formula helps protect the skin from dryness and leaves a smooth, well-cared-for appearance suitable for both face and neck use

Lightweight and Fast-Absorbing – The non-greasy texture makes it ideal for morning use before makeup or sunscreen. It glides easily over the skin, ensuring your complexion feels fresh, hydrated, and comfortable all day long
What’s Included – 1 x Nuage Day Cream 50 ml jar
description: Product description Nuage Day Cream delivers gentle, oil-enriched hydration for normal to dry skin. Blended with argan, olive, and apricot kernel oils, this day moisturiser absorbs easily and helps maintain skin comfort throughout the day without feeling heavy. Use on face and neck after cleansing for a smooth, nourished feel Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Petrolatum, Stearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Cetyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-25, Phenoxyethanol, Glyceryl Stearate, Propylene Glycol, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Dimethicone, Parfum, Octyldodecanol, Carbomer, Triethanolamine, Benzyl Alcohol, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil, Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Ascorbic Acid, Hydroxycitronellal, Isoeugenol, Benzyl Salicylate, Geraniol, Linalool, Citronellol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Hexamethylindanopyran, Terpineol Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. See more
